mood: bright block-based source field shaped by current research
lighting: follow the source set toward even, open illumination unless the evidence clearly calls for drama
object_inventory: one to three major structures if that best fits the evidence
derive anchor scale and loudness from the source field; some anchors can be bold islands while others remain embedded details
negative_constraints: no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
avoid generic office-room, dashboard, or card-grid fallback staging
